nodes.label: This property can be used as a prefix for any HTTP method call to return

Create Vault          Args:           display_name: Human-readable name for the
Get Vault          Args:           betas: Optional header to specify the beta ve
Update Vault          Args:           display_name: Updated human-readable name
List Vaults          Args:           include_archived: Whether to include archiv
Delete Vault          Args:           betas: Optional header to specify the beta
Archive Vault          Args:           betas: Optional header to specify the bet
